channel.title: Pranav Harikumar Writing
channel.description: Technical notes, architecture writeups, and blog posts on governed AI systems, memory, reliability, and deterministic execution.

item.title: The Basilisk Is the Race, Not the Model.
item.description: A piece on why the danger in AI is not one future model or one person, but the race condition that makes governed architecture the realistic safety frontier.

item.title: Governed Memory Layer for Multi-Agent Shared State
item.description: A systems-first writeup on governed memory promotion, append-only events, canonical projections, pending ambiguity, and why shared state should be earned rather than appended.

item.title: Deterministic Compilation for Structured LLM Workflows
item.description: A long-form breakdown of typed node registries, static validation, and why planning should be constrained before codegen begins.
